candidates.title: Salsa Scrambled Eggs
candidates.why_it_matches: Uses exactly your four ingredients—eggs, salsa, tortillas, and cheese—in a single quick skillet scramble with only cilantro as an optional extra.

candidates.title: Simple Scrambled Egg Tacos with Cheese & Salsa | Laura Fuentes
candidates.dish_name: Scrambled Egg Tacos with Cheese & Salsa
candidates.why_it_matches: Ultra-quick scrambled egg tacos using your eggs, cheese, tortillas, and salsa verde with optional cilantro-lime dressing.

candidates.title: Scrambled Eggs with Salsa and Cheese - Eggs.ca

candidates.why_it_matches: A 20-minute Tex-Mex scramble on tortillas with cheese and salsa, using all your ingredients plus onion and sweet pepper.

candidates.title: Salsa Scrambled Egg Wraps
candidates.why_it_matches: Fast 15-minute wraps with scrambled eggs, cheese, and salsa in tortillas, though it specifies Pepper Jack and adds avocado.

candidates.title: Scrambled Egg Tacos with Salsa Verde - Delish Knowledge
candidates.dish_name: Scrambled Egg Tacos with Salsa Verde
candidates.why_it_matches: Quick 20-minute egg tacos with cheese and salsa verde, though it leans on cotija and avocado for its signature flavor.

candidates.title: Breakfast Tacos Recipe - Love and Lemons
candidates.why_it_matches: Migas-style egg scramble tacos with cheese in tortillas, but uses pico de gallo and avocado rather than plain salsa.

candidates.title: Huevos Rancheros - Rick Bayless
candidates.why_it_matches: Rick Bayless's fried-egg-on-tortilla dish is authentic but relies on a separate roasted tomato salsa and queso fresco.

candidates.title: Egg-Stuffed Breakfast Tacos - Easy Food Guide
candidates.why_it_matches: Simple cheesy scrambled egg tacos topped with salsa in 20 minutes, but the prose reads like generic machine-generated filler.

candidates.title: Salsa Verde Egg Tacos - Mexican Recipes - Old El Paso
candidates.why_it_matches: Quick 20-minute egg tacos with cheese and salsa, but it's built around branded Old El Paso tortilla bowls, sauce, and pico.

candidates.title: Huevos Rancheros Recipe
candidates.why_it_matches: Classic eggs on tortillas smothered in salsa, but it has you make salsa from scratch with onion, tomatoes, and chiles, adding time and extra ingredients.

candidates.title: Easy Huevos Rancheros - Cafe Delites
candidates.why_it_matches: Eggs poached in a salsa-tomato sauce over tortillas, but requires building a sauce with onion, garlic, pepper, and crushed tomatoes.

candidates.title: Easy Huevos Rancheros
candidates.why_it_matches: Quick huevos rancheros with eggs, cheese, salsa, and tortillas, but it centers on refried beans and bacon you didn't mention.
